node.text: @alphonsodavies with the assist, and now with the call in Portuguese thanks to Amazon Nova. Tools like this help AWS and @Bundesliga bring the beautiful game to fans everywhere, in their language. Golaço never sounded so good.

node.text:
Claude Sonnet 4.6 just dropped on Amazon Bedrock, and it's a game-changer for enterprise AI.
 
It delivers frontier intelligence at scale—built for coding, agents, and enterprise workflows.

Perfect for high-volume coding, agentic workflows, and browser automation at scale.
 
Seamless migration from Sonnet 4.5 with minimal prompting changes.

Link in bio.

node.text:
If love were measured in AWS fiber-optic cable, you’d be able to go to the Moon and back not just once, but 11 times. 

That’s over nine million kilometers of terrestrial and subsea fiber-optic cabling connecting people worldwide through our global network.

We hope you find someone (or already have) who loves you to the Moon and back — or at least as much as AWS optical engineers love fiber.
Deploy some love this Valentine's Day. Share this with your favorite person. 💕

node.text:
So, Niklas Süle doesn’t speak Arabic.

But when he scores, fans will hear the goal call in their own language, same voice, same energy.

Real-time voice translation is coming to Bundesliga and fans worldwide. Full breakdown in bio.

node.text:
Nerding out over how cool this is

Every @NFL snap generates millions of data points. Twenty-two players accelerating, colliding, and changing direction in fractions of a second.

For a decade, @nextgenstats powered by @amazonwebservices has turned that chaos into data that forms the backbone of how teams scout, strategize, and win—and how the league studies officiating, player safety, and rule changes.

Seventy-five machine learning models. Insights in under one second. Here's how it works.

The major unlock you might not be thinking about?

AI governance. And it doesn't slow teams down, it sets them loose.

Tune in as PBS’ Mikey Centrella joins the AWS Generative AI Innovation Center's Sri Elaprolu and Randi Larson to talk how security, data privacy & guardrails actually fuel innovation

node.text:
AI just leveled up: Meet a model that works independently while you focus on strategy.

Anthropic's Claude Opus 4.6 is here and transforms multi-day projects into hours-long tasks.

From autonomous coding to enterprise workflows, this model delivers professional-quality outputs with fewer revision rounds.

Best-in-class for production code and complex automation.

Industry-leading performance for agentic workflows and multi-step orchestration, AI that handles the heavy lifting so you can drive innovation.

Now available in Amazon Bedrock

Link in bio.

node.text:
When the game's on the line, how do teams decide to go for it all? 

@NFL Next Gen Stats powered by AWS delivers AI-driven insights that add context to every decision, giving fans and broadcasters a deeper layer of game intelligence. Link in bio for more.

node.text:
Not every shot or rebound in the NBA is created equal. 

The new Leverage metric from @amazonwebservices and @nba adds context to every play, quantifying impact in ways that haven’t existed before.

node.text:
Ever wonder what happens behind the scenes of your favorite @PBS shows? 

Mikey Centrella joins AWS's Sri Elaprolu and host Randi Larson to break down how AI is transforming public media, from content production and educational programming to helping you find that perfect show where and when you want it.

node.text:
The Amazon Nova AI Hackathon invites developers worldwide to build innovative generative AI solutions using Amazon Nova and win $40,000 USD in prizes.

6 weeks to create, innovate, and showcase your skills.

Get started with code samples, workshops, and more resources.

Register now and claim your $100 in AWS credits to get started. 

Link in bio.

Ever wondered how your data travels across continents in seconds? 

AWS operates nine million kilometers of fiber-optic cables across multiple routes, ensuring your data always finds a way through.

node.text:
Has Drake Maye exceeded expectations this season?

Whether he is the new GOAT, or just having a "lightning in a bottle" season, @NFL Next Gen Stats powered by AWS show he’s already a league leader. All eyes are on the QB sensation as he prepares to lead the @patriots onto the field for Super Bowl Sunday.

node.text:
Which one is harder: Coming up with a world-changing idea in 48 hours, or actually building it in 1? 

On Episode 001, we found a certified Golden Jacket (Jordan Jones, @jjones1911) and asked him to build it in 1 hour with @kirodotdev.

node.text:
Build a web-based memory browser for Amazon Bedrock AgentCore to explore what your AI agent remembers. 

Learn memory structure, visualization techniques, and why transparency matters for reliable AI agents. 

Link in bio.

node.text:
What's the one thing you look for when deciding if a player is truly elite?

Super Bowl Sunday is approaching fast, and @NFL Next Gen Stats powered by AWS AI is transforming how we understand what makes champions.

node.text:
What’s one stat you trust more than the eye test? 

As the Super Bowl countdown begins, @NFL Next Gen Stats powered by AWS AI is unlocking game-changing insights that reveal what separates champions from contenders.

node.text: Clutch isn't just about who scores, it's making game winning plays. Introducing Leverage Score, which uses AWS AI to measure a player's impact when it matters most.

node.text: What if you could see the play from a whole new angle? Go behind the scenes with @NFL Next Gen Stats powered by AWS AI and discover how data transforms every moment on the field. Link in bio to learn more.

These standout stats highlight the moments that defined the @NFL season, powered by technology that helps fans understand the game like never before.

Click the 🔗 in bio to learn how AWS is powering the NFL fan experience. 🤩

That’s our QB.

Link in bio.

AWS is building Fastnet, a new state-of-the-art transatlantic subsea fiber optic cable system.

node.text:
AWS Builder Center has launched the Global 10,000 AIdeas.

Developers worldwide can compete for $250,000 in cash prizes, AWS credits, and recognition across 20 winner categories. Build AI-powered applications using cutting-edge tools.

Choose from five impactful tracks: workplace efficiency, daily life enhancement, commercial solutions, social impact, and creative expression.

All projects must be built within Free Tier limits and needs to use Kiro for at least part of development, winning is about innovation and impact.

P.S. Enter your submission by December 30, 2025, for a chance to win $1,000 in AWS credits (for 10 random submissions). Terms Apply.

Link in bio

node.text:
How does Epic Games power millions of players in real-time across Fortnite and other massive titles? AWS is how.

Amazon EC2 instances deploy on-demand in massive compute clusters to render, simulate, and host. Amazon S3 stores petabytes of game assets ready to stream anywhere. 

CloudFront, Global Accelerator, and Amazon Timestream deliver low-latency performance globally.

Epic builds the most immersive digital experiences on the planet. AWS gives them the power to do it at global scale.

node.text:
Next Generation of Compute-Optimized Instances with AMD EPYC Processors on AWS

Today we're excited to announce the general availability of Amazon EC2 C8a/R8a/M8a instances! 

Built with 5th Gen AWS AMD EPYC processors, these instances bring significant improvements to your compute-intensive workloads. 

You'll receive up to 30% higher performance and 33% more memory bandwidth, while enjoying up to 19% better price-performance. 

Link in bio

node.text:
Move AI agents from prototype to production faster without infrastructure management.

Whether you're using Strands Agents SDK, LangChain, or any other framework with your favorite LLM, AgentCore handles the infrastructure complexity, so you can innovate with confidence

See how you can deploy an agent in less than 60 seconds

node.text:
Level up your DevOps career with these 3 essential MCP Servers from AWS Labs

These powerful tools are the foundation for modern cloud infrastructure management:
1/ EKS MCP Server
2/ Terraform MCP Server
3/ CloudWatch MCP Server

These servers provide the building blocks for modern cloud architecture, creating a complete skill set highly valued in today's tech landscape.

Link in bio to get started 🔗

Millions of design dreams. One canvas.

AWS is how @Canva powers 240M creators with AI-enhanced design tools, transforming nearly one billion hours of work into instant possibilities.

When AI joins your creative flow, it's just drag, drop, done.

Link in bio. 🔗

node.text:
Transform your data swamp into a streamlined data lake with Amazon S3 Tables - solving 4 critical data problems in minutes

Here's how #AmazonS3 Tables revolutionizes data management:

1/ Schema evolution made simple

2/ ACID transactions in data lakes

3/ Time travel queries

4/ Automatic File Compaction

S3 Tables handles ALL the heavy lifting - compaction, optimization, and maintenance are completely automated. 

Link in bio

node.text:
Building production-ready AI agents just got easier with Amazon Bedrock AgentCore MCP server

Deploying agents used to require handling complex configurations yourself. Now you can complete these tasks in just minutes by chatting with your coding assistant!

The demo shows integrating AgentCore into a weather app using Kiro as the coding assistant, but you can use any MCP enabled AI coding tool.

Within minutes, you'll have a fully-loaded application with memory capabilities, ready for production deployment on AWS.

Link in bio 🔗

node.text:
How tough was that shot?! 🏀 📊 

Shot Difficulty looks past makes and misses to show how tough each attempt really was. 

Using AWS AI to measure over 20 factors that go into each shot, Expected Field Goal Percentage (xFG%) breaks down who takes, and makes, the hardest looks in real time.

node.text:
Meet the new EC2 Intel instances

Power your workloads with new 8th generation EC2 instances with custom Intel Xeon 6 processors, exclusively on AWS. 

From C8i to R8i, you can reign over your resources with flex variants that adapt to your command. 

Link in bio.

Reduce MTTR & drive operational excellence across every environment.

node.text:
In his 2026 tech predictions, CTO of Amazon @djwerner, predicts the rise of the renaissance developer. 

AI changes the tools, not the fundamentals that make great developers. 

Link in Bio.

This AI speaks doctor & patient. 👩‍⚕️🩺💬 

AWS is how @Philips bridges the gap between medical complexity & human understanding, turning daily scans into conversations that save precious time for care.

Link in bio. 🔗

🚨 NFL Big Data Bowl participants

Data Visualization submissions are due December 17th at 11:59PM UTC! 

Finalists will receive an invitation to present at the 2026 NFL Scouting Combine, where one team will win an additional $5K. 

Submit today in the link in bio.

node.text:
Meet Amazon Nova 2 reasoning models

Nova has introduced its next generation of foundation models that deliver frontier intelligence with industry-leading price performance

1/ Amazon Nova 2 Lite, is a fast, cost-effective model designed for everyday AI tasks.

2/ Amazon Nova 2 Pro (preview), Nova’s most intelligent model built for complex AI workloads.

These models offer developers control to manage thinking budgets, native support for agentic workflows, and provide a one-million-token context window for richer interactions.

Link in bio

#AWSreInvent

node.text:
AWS + AMD: 5th Gen EPYC EC2 Boosts Performance 30%

Power your workloads with AWS's new 8th generation EC2 instances, featuring 5th Gen AMD EPYC processors! 

The complete family of C8a, M8a, and R8a instances are now available.

Link in bio

node.text:
Clouds are better together

Now in Preview, AWS Interconnect - multicloud makes connecting across clouds as easy as 1-2-3. Simple setup. Private. Zero complexity.

#AWSreInvent 

Link in bio 🔗

node.text:
AWS Support just leveled up. Here’s what’s new.

AWS Support now offers context-aware AI assistance, proactive issue prevention & access to AWS experts with response times as fast as 5 minutes for critical issues. #AWSreInvent 

Link in bio. 🔗

node.text:
Managing your AWS partnership just got easier. 

AWS Partner Central is now available in the AWS Management Console, centralizing access to co-sell opportunities, AWS Marketplace management, & Partner connections from one familiar place. 

Turn operational efficiency into accelerated growth. #AWSreInvent

Link in bio 🔗

Write code, right security

AWS Security Agent validates your security standards automatically during design & development. Let AI handle the heavy lifting while your team focuses on shipping innovation. #AWSreInvent

Want power? Try an army of cores.

Amazon EC2 M9g instances with 192 cores in one chip, delivering the most powerful processor we’ve ever designed. Command an elite force delivering up to 25% better performance with best price performance in EC2. #AWSreInvent 

 Link in bio. 🔗

node.text:
Training setbacks? Make them comebacks.

Checkpointless training on SageMaker HyperPod transforms foundation model training at scale, eliminating lost progress & wasted compute. Recover from training faults in minutes.

Link in bio. 🔗

node.text:
Put your AI models on the fast track.

Introducing Amazon SageMaker AI's new serverless model customization capability with AI agent guided workflow in preview that can turn months of development into days. Speed through customization while maintaining perfect precision. #AWSreInvent

Link in bio. 🔗

node.text:
Go long on #AI. 🏈☁️🏟️

AWS is how the @nfl is bringing next-level intelligence to every play, every decision, & every moment that matters.

Ready to see what's next? Link in bio. 🔗

Meet Zero-Day Raccoon. 🦝

Digs through code like trash, finds treasure every time. Your bug report is Raccoon’s midnight snack.

Register for #AWSreInvent through the link in Bio & catch him in action during the #AWS BuilderCards Security pack challenge. 🔗

Introducing your Road to #AWSreInvent competitors! 🚌💻

On Sunday, November 30, ten teams take on a five-hour livestreamed hackathon from LA to Vegas, competing for the chance to launch re:Invent at Midday Madness.

Who are you cheering for? Drop your pick in the comments! 💬

Follow the link in Bio to sign up for notifications so you can watch live. 🔗

node.text:
GAME ON! Your Ultimate Football Experience Starts Here. 🏈 

This season, @easportsofficial and @amazon are your football destination:

🎮 Prime members play EA SPORTS Madden NFL 26 FREE this weekend on @amazonluna. 

👥 Engage with the community on @twitch 

🛒 Save with exclusive @eamaddennfl discounts on Amazon and search “shop the game” in the Amazon Shopping App to find more game day deals. 

Powered by AWS cloud technology @nflonprime. 

Link in bio to learn more. 🔗

Meet Inside Cat. 🐱

Once a data center mouser. Now a data interceptor. She sits between systems, quiet, curious, and always watching the flow.

Register for #AWSreInvent through the link in Bio & catch him in action during the #AWS BuilderCards Security Pack challenge. 🔗

node.text:
The @NFL will make history this week with its first ever game in Spain! 🇪🇸, but right now the @PhiladelphiaEagles are flying high everywhere they play 🦅 #FlyEaglesFly
 
Swipe through to see how they keep bringing the energy big plays, key stats and momentum building. 

Bottom line: this team keeps showing the world how they earned their place in the spotlight and #AWS + #NextGenStats are helping fans experience every second like never before. 
 
Click the 🔗 in bio to learn how AWS is powering the fan experience. 
 
#PhiladelphiaEagles #NFL #NFLEurope #SportsTech

node.text:
Still buzzing from an incredible #AFROTECH25 with the @NBA!

Y'all showed up and showed OUT at our interactive booth. Check out the highlights and catch the future of basketball through the lens of cloud innovation.

#NBAxAWS #TechMoments #BasketballTech #CloudTechnology #Innovation

This mechanic predicts breakdowns before they happen. ⚙️🧑‍🏭☁️

#AWSisHow your machinery spots potential issues early, catching problems before they affect production. Keep your production lines running smoother than ever—no oil can required.

Link in bio.
